get_password: SELECT password from users WHERE user_id = ?
get_user: SELECT u.group_uuid, u.user_uuid, u.user_id, u.user_name, us.storage_uuid, s.storage_name, s.storage_type FROM users u JOIN user_storages us ON u.user_uuid = us.user_uuid JOIN storages s ON s.storage_uuid = us.storage_uuid WHERE u.user_id = ? AND us.is_default = 1

storages.get_node_name: SELECT name FROM nodes WHERE node_uuid = ?
storages.insert_node: INSERT INTO nodes (storage_uuid, node_uuid, name, type, parent_uuid, creator_uuid) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
storages.insert_file: INSERT INTO files (node_uuid, file_hash, file_size, mime_type, creator_uuid) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

share_link.create: INSERT INTO shared_links (token, node_uuid, node_type, password_hash, created_by) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
share_link.get_by_token: SELECT sl.*, n.name, n.storage_uuid, f.mime_type FROM shared_links sl JOIN nodes n ON sl.node_uuid = n.node_uuid LEFT JOIN files f ON n.node_uuid = f.node_uuid WHERE sl.token = ?
share_link.get_by_user: SELECT sl.*, n.name FROM shared_links sl JOIN nodes n ON sl.node_uuid = n.node_uuid WHERE sl.created_by = ? ORDER BY sl.created_at DESC
share_link.delete: DELETE FROM shared_links WHERE token = ? AND created_by = ?
share_link.exists: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shared_links WHERE node_uuid = ? AND created_by = ?
